subcodes.title: Words to a Christian minister, spoken on 1914-06-09
subcodes.first_line: His holiness Christ came for the promulgation of the law of love; all the prophets were sent… Hast thou love?...
subcodes.subjects: @power of love, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @idle talk; backbiting; speaking ill of others, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @love and unity
